Perhaps the bar service could have been better but I m just being picky   The location of the hotel was perfect for all that Vienna had to offermand only about 12 15 euros in a taxi from the train station if you catch the airport express train The Spanish horse school and a variety of museums were very close by and many restaurants to choose from in the evening as the hotel didn t serve evening meals The hotel was completely full but still very quiet and relaxed atmosphere The breakfast which we hadn t realized was included in the price was excellent with a good variety on offer and set us up for the day The breakfast room staff were friendly and welcoming especially Sairene who was particularly helpful The Coffee was perfect All in all a great experience and would stay again

I cannot think of anything that could be better   Hotel Das Tigra lies in a quiet street in Vienna Currently they are building a new apartment complex just across the street This means that workers arrive around 6 45 When the windows are closed it will not bother you However the hotel has also supplied some foam ear pieces which I didn t have to use Be aware that the hotel is not very close to the subway it is about a 10 minute walk to the nearest station For me this is fine no problem I actually like that the hotel is a bit away from the crowd I have stayed here many times and it is always a pleasure The staff is always very kind without exception To put it simply this is my No 1 choice when traveling to Vienna

The staff at breakfast were rude and made me feel like I was imposing because of this I chose to eat breakfast out each day which worked out cheaper  The concierge and check in were amazing they allowed my to get into a room early and store a bag late Having travelled alone and arriving after being robbed this was an amazing blessing and it felt incredibly welcoming

Nothing really  The front office staff were very helpful at the time of check in and check out They guided us very well to make the most of a walking tour for attractions like Hofburn State opera St Stephan Cathedral etc around the hotel and with travel plans to Schonbrunn and the airport by public transport The stay was very comfortable and memorable

The bar in the hotel while offering 50 off drinks because of the building work opposite could not manage a whiskey with ginger ale and when we asked for Gin and Tonic the bar man took out bitter lemon not tonic However we learned later that he was a new member of staff It would be nice to have a lounge to sit in that is not the main reception area   The proximity to the centre of Vienna was great The breakfast choice was amazing and very tasty
Separate toilet and bathroom in room   Breakfast was very good great selection Room was very comfortable plenty of space Welcome chocolates were a nice touch

Nothing   The local was right in the town centre The staff were extremely helpful and polite We arrived after midnight and the reception was open so we were able to check in without any problems Our room was spacious very clean and comfortable Would highly recommend this hotel

The hote was in a central location And the room was very comfortable There was a fabulous breakfast included The staff was extremely helpful with directions and booking things for us We would highly recommend this hotel

The lobby was not very welcoming a little dark and cramped   Breakfast buffet was excellent with plenty of choice cappuccinos etc were included The staff were very helpful and friendly they recommended a great restaurant for us and happily booked taxis for us Their English was excellent which was very helpful The beds were comfy and the rooms were spacious and clean The hotel was in an excellent location vey central within walking distance of all attractions

A very small thing shower in a bath but this is not unusual in European Hotels   We were given a suite upgrade from a junior suite for free and the room was comfortable and excellent size Location of Das Tigra very good

Cannot complain about any thing   We loved the central location of the hotel on the Old Town Upon checkin one of the best suggestions was to take a walking tour of the old town given our limited stay period A tour was outlined to us o The map and we covered a lot of ground Also appreciated suggestions for restaurant They very good quality at reasonable prices We were treated extremely well

Lift was very slow and too small for the number of rooms towels were hard and not very absorbent  room was large and spacious location was good walking distance to all tourist attractions and transport links

There was absolutely nothing that I didn t like I liked everything And I hope to return   I honestly couldn t say enough nice things about this hotel It was fabulous in every respect I only wonder why its not a 5 as I think it should be Staff were so friendly and efficient The room was quite large and the bathroom was superb Breakfast caters for all tastes

Wi fi in my first room simply didn t work luckily I was able to change to another room closer to the router but this shouldn t happen anyway especially as was doing a business conference call   Nice room and great service not as old and pokey as other hotels of similar standard in Vienna The building works didn t bother me too much and 50 at the bar is good compensation

Not the fault of the hotel at all but heavy construction going on across the street with jackhammers starting before 0730 This is a big project and will not be done soon It would be fine if I was traveling on business and was planning to wake early but not so much on vacation   Super helpful staff

There is major construction across the street starting at 7 AM but the hotel offset that by offering half price drinks on everything in the bar How about a good bottle of Gruner Veltlinger for only 13 euros   The staff were great and very helpful especially Henry the bartender and the front desk staff Rooms were large and comfortable The hotel has history it is made up of 4 old townhouses that have been joined together Mozart lived in one of them as a 6 year old and then again later as a young man in another All the wall hangings celebrate this fact Location right in the center of old town Breakfast was typical Austrian Germanic a huge spread of cold cuts cheeses salads fruit many breads and scrambled eggs bacon and sausages Something for every taste
The rain However the weather was pretty good Loved Vienna so no complaints  The receptionist was extremely helpful and friendly with good suggestions Lovely room for my daughter Full marks

Unfortunately a huge construction site is right in front of the property I would recommend to mention that during the booking Very bad and strong noise   Unfortunately a huge construction site is right in front of the property I would recommend to mention that during the booking Very bad and strong noise

I would only mark the hotel down slightly on value for money as it was quite a high price per night but that is the way of things in Vienna I guess   Really friendly staff very helpful Clean rooms Good choice of food at breakfast

Rooms were hot and AC didn t seem to work There is a building site opposite and nightclub not far away so it can be loud at night   Location is excellent and you are right in the heart of Vienna Bed is very comfy in a nicely furnished room and good quality bathroom Well worth a stay if it can be had for a cut down price

the room is very hot in April I couldn t sleep because the cooling system not working in winter only heating also we open the window but it was noisy till 3 am too much people talking and laughing I think there NightClub down street We couldn t sleep in the hotel I highly not recommend it   Nothing I like except the location and the stuff of the breakfast buffet

1 There s construction going on on the opposite side of the hotel but we didn t experience any noise problem during our stay 2 No ventilation in either the toilet or bathroom 3 The AC was a bit warm I didn t want to open the windows as the street noise may disturb our sleep 4 The pillows were my biggest complaint They were way too flat and fluffy to my liking 5 Very flimsy door card signage It kept flying away whenever we open close the doors 6 Most of the interesting channels were not available in English language   We stayed at this hotel for three nights Superior Double Room Though not the most modern hotel I ve ever seen I was incredibly impressed with the room layout and storage space It s rare to see such a well thought out and functional room these days But Hotel Das Tigra hit all the right marks with the ample amount of shelves tabletops electrical sockets and wall hangers The room was extremely clean with excellent wifi We didn t try the breakfast so cannot comment on that The staff were friendly and the hotel was situated in a pretty central location around 10 mins walk to the city centre 15 mins ride to the train station and around 30 mins from the airport The staff were friendly and helpful We were very happy with our choice and would choose to stay here again next time

Major repair works are taking place in front of the hotel and might last for quite long time Unfortunately the staff gave me a room at the first floor facing the entrance to the repair area Very noisy works started at 5 40am The earplugs offered by the hotel were clearly not enough to ensure a good sleep The WiFi in my room was very slow and required a login each time I tried to access the web   The room was cosy and clean Probably the great position is the best asset of the hotel
noise from renovation next door  Helpful staff in changing my room to a better and less noisy one Not charging for last night even though I checked out very late

Next door building site was really a pain i but the staff made aware of this and consequently I accepted this as just another experience which will dissappear before i come next time   Everything is fine good location for the city centre staff is very friendly and nice excellent but a bit expensive breakfast
It was a bit noisy due to construction work going on However in general no other comments   The staff was very helpful The hotel is nicely located Breakfast was nice though not too much choice

Major problem with the noise from the building site across the road starting before 6 30 in the morning Hotel staff were very apologetic and gave us free drinks but it s outside their control a real shame At least Saturday and Sunday mornings were quiet   Pleasant room large comfy bed spacious shower and clean tidy communal areas

Cleaning could have been better Construction site at the opposite side of the road They fortunatelly didn t have any work going on during the weekend  Easy walking distance to the city center Good breakfast

There was a construction just in front of the hotel and beside the legislation and all efforts of the hotel team to minimize the noise this was a little bit annoying people revolving rocks at 6 am   Everything was nice and the crew was very helpfull and attencious

There is building works going on across the street but there was no noise before 8am and the hotel compensated by 50 off at the bar and also gave 2 out of the 3 days breakfasts for free Did not affect us is any way   Staff were excellent being both helpful and attentive Location was great and had lovely bars cafes and sights nearby Hotel was spotless and allowed for a very enjoyable trip

At best this hotel is a 3 5 star There is construction directly facing most of the rooms The more elevated the room the better but the bystanders that attend what appears to be a bar facing the hotel generates additional noise And the ear plugs provided just don t cut it   The location is excellent It s in walking distance of most cafes and shopping areas
There is no restaurant in the hotel to eat dinner  Very comfortable bed Good location very close to the city center Friendly and helpful staff

The street the hotel is in is a bit scruffy not helped by current building works opposite major development however noise from site only apparent 7am 4pm weekdays and not at all on weekends Most guests would be out sightseeing in the day so of no consequence Hotel compensates with 50 discount on bar bill If you are the kind of guest who prefers to loiter in the hotel during the day or to use for a business meeting this would not be suitable  Very friendly and helpful staff Comfortable sitting area in lobby and within walking distance to the main sights Short walk about one block to local cafes restaurants There are more central hotels but this represented excellent value for being in near proximity Please note there is no restaurant onsite and public areas limited To a small bar and lobby Great base for sightseeing Several lifts to all floors Rooms are spacious and modern and up to date bathrooms with walk in showers No views of course being a city hotel Would definitely use again

There is construction work going on across the road I m an early riser so it had no impact on me but if you want to sleep in then I recommend you look somewhere else because the noise will ruin your morning   Breakfast was excellent Nice room with comfortable bed Nice staff at reception and in the restaurant Location is handy to St Stephen s Cathedral and to tourist services
Temporary weekday noise from building work nearby starts early in the morning before 7am   Great location in old city centre Fully modernised warm and comfortable

At the moment there is construction work across the street from the hotel May disturb those who want to sleep late   Excellent location walking distance to all major attraction and metro Staff was very nice and welcoming Rich breakfast and choices for non gluten and vegan The service at the breakfast was excellent they we re very attentive to our dietary needs I highly recommend this hotel

Before booking we were not made aware of extensive building work including mechanical diggers opposite from 6am Terrible duvets for bed only singles even if you get a double twin Rooms are tired and need refreshing   Bathroom modern clean

The hotel was centrally located in downtown Vienna Easy walking distance to many of the sights and the U Bahn stations There is construction going on across the street from the hotel resulting in increased noise levels in the hotel room during working hours 0900 1800 However the hotel recognized this inconvenience and provided earplugs in the room as well as 50 off at the hotel bar

Unfortunately there is some construction work across the road and they start at 7am making sleeping in very difficult However the hotel is apologetic for this inconvenience   Good central location in the centre of Vienna The train stations are close by making sightseeing easy The breakfast is terrific The staff were friendly and helpful Would definitely stay here again
The room was not being cleaned according to our expectations The cups were not washed and left in the sink and the next day we were given a broken cup   The calmness good breakfast and kind staff

Found breakfast room too busy even though we paid for breakfast we ended up eating out to avoid long wait   Location great and reception staff very knowledgeable Room great size nice and clean Noticeable building works over the road but the hotel compensated for this with cheaper bar drinks which was a generous touch No outside noise was heard and a very good sleep was had would definitely stay here again

There is construction across the road which started at 6am one morning it was usually 7am and was very loud But the hotel did offer half price drinks at the bar to compensate although it isn t their fault   Within walking distance of St Stephens cathedral and most other sites Very warm and cozy hotel Our room was immaculate with a Lovely large bed and fab shower The breakfast was superb had so much choice We could have a cooked breakfast or all kinds of bread cereal pastries and fruit and yogurt Staff were so friendly and customer service was brilliant We Would definitely stay here again if in Vienna

One of the elevators to the left of the entrance handles only 150 kilos   Fabulous hotel We were considering other hotels which got over 9 5 in location Retrospectively it was the best choice We were upgraded to one of the nicest rooms I have ever been to hotel wise Breakfast was fantastic Very helpful staff

The hotel has a small bar but does not have a restaurant  Great location for the xmas markets This small but intimate hotel is spotlessly clean and the staff are very friendly The breakfast room service and choice was excellent

We had a plastic curtain instead of a glass door for the bath however it looked clean Super detailed map with all the streets of Vienna without main attractions higlighted difficult to manage if you haven t done any previous researches   Good breakfast buffet with several options The location is superb Nice comfy bed Staff very helpful and friendly Good internet connection

As mentioned on the website there was some noise from the building work across the way but as this was a city break and we were not in our room much this did not really affect us   All the staff were very friendly and very helpful from the Front Desk to the waitresses in the breakfast room Fantastic Breakfast Best location none of the major landmarks are more than a 15 min walk away

Could have been able to arrange better taxi rate back to airport Friends who booked the same taxi that brought them they got nearly half price return   Lots of breakfast choice Good clean spacious rooms Friendly staff
Nothing negative to say about this hotel we had a verypositive experience   Excellent central location very friendly helpful staff great choice for breakfast excellent value for money
Nothing   It was central and everything I wanted to visit was very accessible The breakfast choice was excellent Staff were very helpful and pleasant

Building work opposite the hotel starts at 7am so no sleeping past that time However the hotel is very apologetic and offers all drinks at half price   Excellent location very central Very good staff very helpful

We loved it   We just loved it staff were wonderfully helpful and friendly hotel was excellently located it was extremely comfortable and there were lots of nice touches chocolates in the room on arrival a yellow rose in the bathroom punch for all in the reception area on Saturday night I am a coeliac also and the staff in the breakfast room were attentive and kind and I was provided with plenty of gluten free products Very impressive We are already discussing returning to Vienna as when travelling with my elderly Mum as I was such things are important considerations

Only problem was that there was construction across the street but somehow it never disturbed me maybe because I needed to get up early every day anyways Also the room structure was a bit weird   Great breakfast staff very courteous good location and overall very comfortable
The picture in the booking dot com is mis leading the price is too too too much for this fasility It s the only thing that upset me in my trip   Nothing

They only have 1 elevator lift for the entire building Didn t really bother us though We still recommend the hotel and stay here again next time   Breakfast was awesome Bed was comfortable Room was clean Staff were friendly and helpful Location is excellent

Better more pillows Staff at check in was not very helpful or friendly when we arrived   Great location Bed was comfortable and room was spacious Breakfast was pretty good each morning but not much variance day to day Would stay again
Lift slow and small Could be a problem for some   Fabulous breakfast Large comfortable room Big bed Pillows Good mini bar snacks Great location Quiet Sky movie chanel Air con Kettle Friendly staff

The bar ran out of Gin   Excellent breakfasts Comfortable large room Friendly helpful staff The acknowledgement that building works opposite might disturb us in the morning 50 discount off bar drinks to compensate us

Wifi was not great in our room   Great breakfast the staff were more than happy to cater to our dietary needs by providing lactose free milk and delicious warm gluten free rolls Staff at front desk were always friendly and helpful Room very comfortable Hotel an easy walk to main center attractions

Although the bed was a double bed the mattress on top was 2 singles which made sleeping on the bed slightly uncomfortable  City centre location walkable distance to key tourist attractions Very friendly staff even helped us with posting international postcards Good breakfast Good room size spotlessly clean Finding out that Mozart had once stayed in the very building in which the hotel is located
I would have love to have a little more light in the room   I found the hotel to be very user friendly and super clean Excellent bathroom The staff was very friendly and helpful

Room was spacious and very clean Service was fast and punctual Everything we asked for was attended 5 minutes later Breakfast was superb Location great with no need for public transportation for main locations Checkout was fast It was a pleasure staying in this hotel
The room was a bit warm at times Aircon couldn t be regulated Needed to open windows sometimes   Spacious and spotless room Seperate toilet was great Staff friendly and helpful

It s in the middle of construction or maybe it s due to the construction across the street but the sign to the hotel was hard to see   There are a number of things that I loved about this hotel cleanliness impeccable customer service comfort and welcoming chocolates and fresh cut rose in bathroom Lastly we had a early train ride so they packed us a go away breakfast which was so helpful

cleaning lady once came too early building site in front of the hotel dirty street somewhat shabby for the price and four stars spooky lift electric kettle with a broken rim furniture   excelent breakfast friendly and helpful staff

There was construction going on directly across from the hotel during our stay The crews would start work as early as 6am which was an unacceptable time for us   The staff we re very friendly and accomodarimg They went out of their way to make our stay enjoyable Breakfast was really lovely Location was also very convenient to major sites

Construction across the road not the hotels fault but there was a little noise in our room facing the construction side upon check in we were told if it was too noisy we could move but it was mostly in the morning when we were getting up anyway so it wasn t an issue There isn t anything much to dislike the only thing i wasn t a fan of is you have to ask for coffee at breakfast it isn t self serve but it isn t a big deal I would stay here again if i went back to Vienna   Spacious room staff very friendly and helpful great delicious breakfast with loads of variety The decor is lovely and fresh looking Staff at breakfast are so attentive and very efficient Comfortable beds good bathroom and you don t hear other guests walking through the corridor Would suggest asking for a room away from lift

We drove to Vienna and when we checked in the woman on front desk directed us to the parking lot she said it was easy just a few streets away but as it turned out she sent us via closed off streets so we sat in bumper to bumper traffic for an hour in a strange city trying to find a new route and ended up back at the hotel and grabbed one of the porters and he knew the roads were closed and took us a different way in 5 mins She never even looked up as we walked past saw her a couple more times waiting for an apology but no Also the room was quite noisy with a building being demolished across the road And for some reason they have taken the doors off the bathroom and toilet and replaced them with glass doors maybe they thought it would modernise the room but it takes away any sound proofing and privacy No hot water on the last day other guests reported the same thing to reception   Great location in Vienna easy walk everywhere Ok hotel
Unkind and unprofessional receptionist Uncomfortable pillows Few TV channels and bathroom sets   Breakfast was excellent and very good situation although gloomy street

Pavel Angerer was helpful friendly and knowledgeable and assisted us with all our enquiries All the staff were well dressed and professional There was some construction work happening across the road but I found the hotel to be very quiet and very convenient

There wasn t internet connection for my smartphone It wasn t fault of hotel staff I just can guess that it was a hotel registration site misfunction However they couldn t fix it and I coulnd t use internet during all my stay It was awfully inconvinient I would also wish that the hotel would provide complimentory bottle of water everyday

Although I requested a stable wifi connection in my room beforehand as I needed to conference call this was not sorted out beforehand and the room I was moved to was not same standard as room I moved from   Location

No negatives during stay   This was a good choice after searching for sometime for hotels in Vienna Better value not being right in old city centre Welcoming check in clean room with good air con easy walk to the sights quiet location generous breakfast

Difficult to find any negatives Would have liked a roof top bar terrace for those relaxing afternoon drinks   The hotel is ideally located for the majority of attractions within Vienna The staff were extremely helpful and knowledgeable whether you were asking for directions or simply asking for guidance to the numerous concerts held around the city We asked for a quiet room and that is was we got The room was clean and extremely comfortable Great breakfast selection I would definately go back should we revisit Vienna

Nothing I can think of   Fantastic location Amazing breakfast with great selection including delicious cakes The room was extremely comfortable Helpful and attentive staff Nice touch of chocolates in the room to welcome us

I asked for a double room The room had a double bed but a single duvet which I found odd however the bed was very comfortable The room was quite warm however when a staff member came to sort my padlock he turned on my air con and it was sorted Another very minor issue was no iron and ironing board in the room but was available on request   The room was clean and comfortable The staff were great I had an issue with my padlock on my suitcase not opening and they sorted it for me The place was in a great location in the 1st district It was in walking distance to the hop on hop off bus Vienna sight seeing I caught the city Airport train to Wien Mitte 12 Euros and then a cab to the hotel 8 Euros as I didn t trust myself at 9pm to find the hotel after catching the underground The next day I found the underground and it was very close
There were no disappointments   The room was well appointed the breakfast excellent and the staff were especially accommodating I would highly recommend this hotel to any traveler
Bathroom was very small  Location perfect for a short stay in Vienna close to centre and cafes Room good size and comfortable Staff helpful and good breakfast with plenty on offer
The cleanliness of the room was ok but one day replacing of our dirty towels did not take place Maybe it might have been a mistake  I liked everything breakfast location

Some reception staff could have been a little more helpful   Very convenient for the Post bus transfer from Vienna airport Good restaurants the canal and most tourist attractions are within walking distance Nice range of choices for breakfast including champagne

I could hear person walking around in the room above unfortunately that was at 5am   Good location Lovely breakfast plenty of choice of food and very attentive servers no wait for coffee and more offered promptly Reception staff very helpful with tour bookings and public transport enquiries

Only slight niggle was the shower gel dispenser not being replaced but really not a big deal at all   I weighed up many hotels for my first visit to Vienna and settled on Hotel Das Tigra based on good reviews and location and discovered it was even better than I thought Front of house staff were friendly and helpful great advice on bus tours didn t get his name but glad I took his advice Their comfort double room is spacious and clean beverage items and kettle are provided with complimentary water and chocolates in the room in arrival a lovely touch and welcome after a long flight Breakfast here is huge delicious and varied as someone who frequently skips breakfast I tucked in and thoroughly enjoyed it it sets you up for a day s sightseeing around this beautiful and historic city

The hotel has a different types of rooms but the way the same type can look is still different it s like you are in another hotel Because it s has a two buildings conected inside the quality of materials and interior details are not the same The main building whith reception is the better one Or it could be that I wasn t lucky   It was a second time in Das Tigra Location is great You are right in historical center but a bit hidden from a crowd and have a car parkings near by
Room rather dark due to limited light as central with buildings opposite Great being so central   Central quiet location Modern comfortable furnishings Staff very helpful Good breakfast choice

Wonderful place to stay The staff was amazingly helpful and friendly there was very clean everywhere and I had one of the best breakfast ever Also location is great just few minutes walk from all main objects This hotel was a nice discover for me

Very friendly and helpful staff and pleased and surprised to find both chocolates and tea coffee making facilities in the room Very clean hotel and an easy walk to both Schottentor and Herengasse U Bahns but at the same time it s possible to walk to all the main sights from here without using the U Bahn at all

Excellent breakfasts and an ideal location just a few minutes walk to the main tourist and shopping areas of the city Lovely hotel with pleasant and helpful staff I would recommend this hotel to anyone
Great location Helpfull and friendly staff Clean and comfortable accommodation Nicely decorated Quiet street although in town centre Excellent breakfast

my directions   Great choice of food and always a friendly smile tea coffee was offered before you finished the previous cup The location was perfect only 5 minutes from anywhere you would like to go and explore peaceful at night yet a stones throw from bars restaurants and walks

Nothing   Great location to be able to walk to St Stephens Platz Spacious comfortable clean room and great breakfast buffet Very friendly helpful staff

Well noise on the street did not allow to sleep with open windows and since AC was not operational yet it was kind of a problem for us since it was too warm in a room We asked to fix it and it became reasonable but still not 100 OK   Room was clean and spacious bed very comfy breakfast decent with prosecco Staff was normally very helpful Location is absolutely fantastic

The breakfast spread was poor Not much options for muslims or even vegetarian Room have no air conditioning When we were there the temperature raises up to 25C Have to open window but not comfortable because facing apartments and hotel across the road The elevator is ridiculously small Can t even accommodate two people and two bags   Location was great Near the palaces and shopping

On the 8 floor room air condition not working properly a little bit airless   Everything was perfekt location everyplace reachable about 10 min walk big cozy room and bathroom helpful staff nice building Good free wifi

I needed to remind things that usually go without saying like changing linen every three days   I would like to thank Stephan one of he managers of the hotel for being very kind and helpful during my stay in the hotel
Room temperature high 25C airco not working lot of noise outside late in the evening   Excellent breakfast Good location in the center very comfortable suite

comfortable room and all other hotel areas we liked this attention to every detail feeling smiling and helpful staff very good breakfast walking distance to many attractions airport bus and subway stations three different U lines nearby we really enjoyed our stay thank you

Rooms are small but nice The street Tiefer Graben is a bit dull and less exiting which you forget just by walking 5 minutes   Friendly staff fantastic location to downtown Nice breakfast and garage nearby
the hotel was excellent the staff on reception were brilliant nothing was too much trouble and our bedroom was probably one of the best we have stayed in

If you travel arround by foot it s a bit away from turist places but they are easiely rechable by near by metro station   Good location spacey rooms quiet disctrict good personal breakfast included can be recomened for anyone looking a good center location hotel with good rooms and service

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Nothing you are near the south bank tower bridge Borough Market   The hotel is brilliant we had a terrace The area is very relaxing A nice community The staff were amazingly helpful A cinema is 20 yards away There is a market there once a week I shall try to stay there every time I go to London It was like living in London staying there The room was very modern and well designed I have never raved so much about a hotel before Please stay there if you can

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: A little closer to the underground would be good but they can t realy help the location Tbh it was only a 10 minutes walk to the tube and lots of buses stopnear by   This place is amazing Super comfortable beds Clean and well presented rooms The view was stunning we could see bit ben the London eye the shard and the gherkin from our window On the evening we left the curtains open so we could see it Amazing walk in shower was like a waterfall Great TV reception and I can t thank the staff enough for being so helpfull Even helping us choose the right bus routes for where we needed to go Right next to a park so pretty quiet to We had a continental breakfast and it was one of the best I have had due to the fresh meats cheese and pastrys available ALeo there is a mini Sainsburys across the rd so handy for grabbing snacks and drinks I will be going back again Thank u for making our weekend one to remember

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: It was impossible to open the windows for ventilation because the windows were from floor to ceiling I would like to note that there is not enough slippers and a robe

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Fussy rules for breakfast option Omelette choice did not allow my wife to have continental breakfast as well Not an easy location to get to If you re looking for close proximity to a station forget it  Bespoke hotel and bespoke breakfast excellent Charming Square and very pleasant Quirky room design Loved the wet room shower Reception girls brilliant

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: There is no alcohol and no pork being sold at the restaurant but I guess this is for personal reasons of the owners Fridge in room wasn t cold at all   Lovely terrace room TV had excellent connectivity HDMI etc

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Relatively expensive but that s London   Upgraded to a room with a terrace overlooking a Sainsbury s Local and a coffee bar Very good size room for London Very clean modern comfortable bed good shower wi fi Within walking distance of Tower Bridge Would stay here again

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Not ideal that they can t serve alcohol but as I said lots of bars near by so no real issue   Very cool area with plenty of bars and restaurants to look around Bermondsey seems to be a very up and coming area and this hotel fits the neighbourhood perfectly

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: See above plus the size of the rooms the shower leaked onto bathroom floor and the breakfast coffee was not appealing Full Continental breakfasts were included in the tariff and we were allowed to store unwanted luggage not required on side trips even though there wasn t a specified store room This was appreciated   The location of the designated rooms was quiet however the bed at first stay was like a hammock very uncomfortable the subsequent visits we requested and were given twin beds a slight improvement but still too soft with regard to the mattresses We were allocated the same room for both the second and third visits The location was convenient for our purpose The prices varied and were too expensive for the accommodation experienced

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Shower closure allows water to leak out and leave the floor wet every time I take a shower   Overall The Bermondsey Square Hotel provides a good value for money accommodation in good location The room has a decent size although odd shaped The bed is comfortable Wifi is strong Shower is powerful All basic amenities are provided Staffs are helpful There is a mini Sainsbury s right opposite the hotel There is a very good cafe serving English and authentic Turkish breakfast with amazing value and friendly staffs called Roca Cafe nearby Antique market is right outside the hotel every Friday Ropewalk and Borough market is a short stroll away A few buses stop right outside the hotel which takes you to 1 of the 3 underground stations nearby if you don t fancy walking which takes around 15 mins Mercato Metropolitano is a short bus ride and a bit of a stroll away

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Some noise supercars racing in the early hours from the street Is it possible to further soundproof the windows This didn t spoil my stay overall though will definitely consider booking again   Arrived to find I d been upgraded nice surprise Lovely spacious room fabulous view of London Bed was very comfortable Room immaculately clean Very handy location liked the fact that Sainsbury s was just opposite and open until late Close to a good selection of restaurants

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The reception desk the amenities not the staff and the entrance to the elevators do not correspond to the high quality of the rooms Strange way of rearranging towels some stains were present in the bathroom   Comfortable room with an excellent bed quiet nights made for a good night s sleep The bathroom was well equipped Great neighbourhood with bars restaurants and a beautiful park nearby

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: staff were inefficient no bar no 24 access to hotel Had to force open door when returning to hotel   upgraded to a suite after error with booking and them not having my room

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Beds a little on the soft side I think for the price that breakfast should be included  Great location comfortable and clean rooms which are a decent size Breakfast was tasty and good selection

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The hotel did not come up to my expectations of a 4 star at all It was definitely not worth the price I paid I had to pay an extra 25 on my credit card I was told it was if I required any extras even if I didn t want any extras I still had to pay the 25 I had no choice it was mandatory no mention of that one before I booked On checking out I was told that the 25 would be back in my bank account by the end of the week Not at all happy with this   The area as we were very central close to Tower Bridge and Bermondsey Street

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Like many hotels now they have in room smartphone tablets for services Mine delightfully woke me up with an alarm call at 1 30am The device was locked with a PIN so I couldn t switched the thing off Most annoying   Great location The rooms are small but very comfortable This is London after all Nice bar and food area downstairs though note this is a dry hotel no booze

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: My teenage daughter and i were given a room with a double bed i thought i had asked for 2 singles but i wasn t too fussed when i found out i was given a double since we are both petite For 2 people with a huge suitcase each the room was relatively small One of us spread out luggage on the floor and the other had to spread our suitcase out on their writing table behind the bed head i think the room we were given would have been perfect for the business traveler carrying a small suitcase   Bermondsey is located in a nice part of the Southwark Borough It s close to the sites like Tower of London 15 minute walking distance Borough Market about 20 minute on foot Tower bridge It s about 15 to 17 minutes to the Bermondsey and London bridge Underground The hotel has a nice quiet location close to nice coffee shop and has a great Turkish Restaurant at it s doorstep a stone s throw The hotel feels modern and clean

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: A room a bit small and curtains did not cover all the light in the morning   Quiet comfortable bed very clean Convinient location if you are keen to explore neighbourhood

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Customer service Our first room didn t get a wifi signal and some staff flatly didn t care or showed no interest in remeding the issue It was only after raising the issue with a manager was some action belatedly taken Second room had wifi but a partially broken a c It pumped out cold air but did so with a loud high pitch drone unless we turned it to a low setting to offset the drone Again staff didn t seem to care that much   The beds are very comfy and the location is pretty good 10 12 minute walk to the tube Good restaurants and coffee nearby on bernondsey street

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: May be it s a little bit away from city center but as I was not expecting that it was OK for me   The hotel is cute it looks like any other but when you cross the reception you see some style It s confortable with big rooms and quite area Probably I ll go there again next time in the area

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The bed was very soft i do prefer a hard bed other than that nothing else to report   Friendly staff very kindly let us have a late check out on the property as we were running the next day and we were able to come back to the room for a shower The shower in the room was fantastic one of the best i have ever experienced The view was excellent of the Shard and the EYE

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: nothing  Excellent location near to good restaurants and cafes and very convenient for public transport A very nice tranquil hotel The room was spacious and comfortable and the staff were very friendly and efficient

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: There wasn t anything to dislike   Everything was as we d hoped We asked for a room with a view and we got it We had some reservations about booking because of a previous review whuch claimed the staff let the hotel down not in our experience they were very polite and exceptionally heloful We ll be staying here again

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The only problem we had with the entire visit was with the booking We booked this in January to stay in May and only found out the week prior that there was some problem with our booking and the payment had neither been taken or contact made with us to advise so We were advised that there was some problem between booking com and the hotel where the card details had not been transferred across A simple call as soon as this was discovered would have resolved this Had to call the hotel several times and then booking com in the evening to resolve When finally resolving the problem with the hotel I did request a room on a high floor and thought this was little to ask by way of making good but we were allocated 1st floor so not even this was done as a gesture both parties blaming one another   Great location within easy walking distance of London Bridge and Tower Bridge Lovely community feel to the area surrounding with the park opposite

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Great location Lots of nearby restaurants and bars Hotel does not serve alcohol however there is a Sainsbury s opposite and a fridge provided in the room with glasses if you really can t go without There are so many bars within a minute or two s walk away that it did not matter at all Comfy bedroom with everything you need including good air con which actually works well and a bathroom which has space unusual for London Breakfast was excellent I can highly recommend the Eggs Royale and staff were friendly and courteous They do not serve pork products either but my husband loved the chicken herb sausages and turkey rashers instead Within walking distance to Tower Bridge St Catherine s dock area and Borough tube for access to central London Would definitely recommend and would stay again

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Room was unprepared one light bulb needed replacing selection of teas not refilled short one set of towels and innovative free internet mobile device would not connect so was useless Different reception staff on second next day rather rude and disinterested in answering questions Thermostat set to go no lower than 19 C fan helped because picture window not made to open No wardrobe in contemporary room only racks near door with 6 hangers Note the hotel restaurant has no alcohol licence and limited food selections not full service Finally there seemed little security The outer door to London streets still unlocked 12 AM and no one at reception By day we often walked through to the elevator and up to room with no one around   Staff at check in very welcoming convenient access to room with wonderful modern shower and bath Bed very comfortable large picture window in contemporary room small refrigerator and excellent television Location is 10 20 minute walk to train or tube but all manner of shops restaurants cafes and stores within a minute s walk The square has conveniences food and antique market every Friday Hotel restaurant s food above average in quality within a large open plan lobby and sitting area Laundry service was timely

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: People in other rooms made lots of noise which was disappointing it was so easily heard not great sound proofing  If you like boutique shops and restaurants great hotel location easy access to central London

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Blonde receptionist not what I d call rude but not very friendly either and it was a bit off putting considering the price of the hotel per night She looked like she couldn t wait to be going home Only other staff I met were cleaners who were friendly   Very clean and comfortable room

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Stain on carpet Woke up to realise the blind on the on the big French windows were missing despite a terraced room with overlooking offices and flats So spent the morning in the dark Fridge didn t work the woman who came to look at it just shrugged her shoulders and huffed and walked out Hairdryer broke staffing didn t seem pro at all in the lounge area Microwaved carrot cake not fresh Not an Apple TV as described   Good location for wandering and hanging out Glad I had a huge discount through booking com Otherwise I d have been upset as it was meant to be a romantic break

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: We were told on arrival that alcohol was not served at this hotel this was not advertised on their site also we found out at breakfast that they did not serve any pork products We are extremely angry that we were not informed of this as we would not have booked this hotel The bed was awful and far to soft the air con did not work and the shower flooded the bathroom  The view from our room was fabulous

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: advertised as full English breakfast no bacon turkey rashers was Halal hotel wasn t too much of a problem but I don t like being misled I find London overpriced for more or less everything  lovely bedroom with large balcony cleanliness bathsheets rather than bath towels location was ideal for purpose of my visit helpful pleasant staff

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Was a little bit far from the tube stop 10 15 minute walk Food was good just not great   Very spacious room overseeing the square Quiet clean new very nice Restaurant staff friendly though the food is not exceptional can sit outside which is nice Nice location near a lot of restaurants

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The staff were very efficient but quite cold and impersonal They didnt seem to communicate with each other very well as we were asked to sign forms several times that had already been signed  The location is excellent not far from London Bridge station and most attractions in walking distance The bed was very comfortable and all areas of the hotel was very clean

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The breakfast was not included in the price I paid   My dog is welcome Clean rooms Nice staff Excellent location Superb restaurants and shops around

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The position of the hotel is just great walking distance from London Bridge Shard Borough Market etc and very well connected also by bus for example to go to London Waterloo The area is very pretty with lots of local coffee shops restaurant and trendy pubs Despite the area it is not noisy and pretty well isolated being located in a tiny nice square where on Friday and Saturday mornings there is a small market The room is very well furnished with also a small beauty area hairdryer nice and wide mirror with led lights Big bathroom and good wifi connection We did not try the breakfast in the hotel but there are plenty of coffee shops in the area one just on the corner in front of the hotel where you can have great coffee and food

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The booking arrangements did not work properly I was threatened with cancellation of my room booking unnecessarily   The room was clean and tidy and a decent size

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: We paid 143 00 for one night with no breakfast I know it is in the heart of London but still quite pricey especially as they also could not offer any parking facilities The reception is small and the staff although pleasant were very matter of fact There is no alcohol served on the premises which is unfortunate as it would have been nice to relax in the comfy chairs with a glass of wine   Really lovely room very clean Bath towels were fluffy and nice and big The room was a good temperature and despite being in the heart of London was very quiet we had a really good nights sleep

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The air conditioning did not work Unfortunately I only discovered this at 1 am and did not feel it would be productive or conducive to more sleep to ask the hotel staff to come and sort it out at that time of night   Good spacious room comfortable bed spacious walk in shower

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The attitude of the staff not friendly and not professional Terrasse rooms are ok but are on the first floor with a view on the building across the classic room is not nice at all bathroom especially not convenient   Area is nice and developing

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Non pork breakfast sounded unappealing and dining area open to lobby so again not appealing Quite basic communal areas   Helpful reception Room newly refurbished and clean with good sized shower well located for restaurants and south bank Parking cheap secure parking nearby We even got free parking for the weekend just outside the hotel door

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The windows do not open so you are reliant on A C  Great check in experience and the bedroom affords excellent value for money in a central London location

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Being a disabled person trying to find a parking space nearby was a bit tricky but Daniel came to our rescue   The staff were very helpful and kind Daniel especially welcomed us Lovely chap

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The bed was way too soft   The feel of the hotel the staff The room was pleasant And the hotel is very well located next to a great neighbourhood

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: There is no bar or minibar supplies and the restaurant area seemed to close quite early Breakfast could be improved but is okay   Rooms and bathrooms are excellent for a hotel of this size and price Interesting design and layout

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: I asked staff to turn off the radiator in my bathroom before I went out for the evening When I got back later that evening I found that they hadn t done it and so I tried to ring reception but no one picked up despite me trying several times So my room was too hot Other than that it was absolutely fine and I would go again

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Was a little overpriced for a basic room The shower room smelt of stagnant water  The shower was excellent and the bed was comfy The mobile phone in the room was great as you could take it out with you and wifi all day

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Just one for me catastrophic problem was that in most of the rooms the windows are hermetically sealed with no opening I find it impossible to sleep in a room without access to fresh air even if somewhat diesel laden Once I discovered this was the case I found out that there were a few rooms with terraces which of course did have opening French doors so I had to pay for an emergency upgrade at 30 extra This for me of course reduced the value for money as I had to pay more for access to fresh air a commodity I view as standard   Stylish decor with a quirky edge Very clean and well maintained Comfortable bed good sized main room and bathroom Well lit mirror with power point for hair and make up Despite busy location on a plaza with shops restaurants and cinema it was surprisingly quiet for sleeping Excellent continental breakfast with good strong coffee and lots of choice Fresh fruit cereals bread ham cheese smoked salmon pastries etc plus cooked breakfast option for a small extra fee Good value More than all that the staff were really lovely and created a great welcoming ambience I felt very happy and comfortable as a solo traveller which counts for a lot

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: A weird humming from an air vent but I doubt it s like that in every room   Good location near where I had to be with transport links and nice places for food and drinks nearby on Bermondsey St The room was modern and spacious and wouldn t hesitate to recommend it as a place to stay

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Cold water the shower wasn t working properly Understood there was a wider problem but there wasn t much of an apology given the situation   Great location comfy and good size room

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Bed was quite hard and the quilt was too small for the bed 11am check out that extra hour other hotels offer sometimes comes in handy   Great location 10 minute walk from London Bridge Station Hotel very quiet and surrounded by lots of unique businesses except sainsbury s across the road try the coffee shop right next door Didn t use the hotel for food so can t comment on this I m not sure boutique is a description I would use for the hotel but all the same it has some quirkiness about it Would definitely stay again without hesitation

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: There was no hot water for a shower in the morning The staff member on reception used the annoying and non committal I can only apologise No actually there are plenty of other things you could do like offer a complimentary coffee or breakfast offer a partial refund or discount off another stay Disappointing response

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: There was no hot water in the morning Apparently the boiler had broken No compensation offered Reception area v small just a desk chair behind a screen

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Shower head needed cleaning Limescale not a monsoon more of a light summer shower The Full English Breakfast was not chicken and tarragon sausages and turkey bacon No pork option Designed to appease the minority not to feed the majority The heating would not go below 19 degrees to warm to sleep in   The bed and room were comfortable clean and quiet

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Lack of hot water in the room so not able to shower and having to boil kettles to wash so it defeated the object of a relaxed weekend   The bed was lovely and comfortable the room spacious and the location great

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Hot water wasn t working properly although this wasn t the fault of the hotel staff and they did make us very aware of it straight away and were very sorry which we were thankful for   Great location and friendly staff great wifi

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The reception area appeared disorganised and the receptionists have no defined work space which added to a generally unprofessional first impression Be sure to have the original credit debit card to hand on arrival as this is required before a room key will be issued The request for a quiet room did not appear on the booking information   Location was quiet and convenient for my needs The room was very clean and the bed was comfortable The bathroom had a spacious shower area with an excellent shower

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: No bar albeit I understand why no alcohol This usually creates a focal point and a buzz about the place that was lacking  Location and room were good

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Agree with previous reviewer regarding lack of bacon   Very nice amenable hotel exactly in the area where we wanted to spend the weekend near our daughter s flat Ideal parking arrangements nearby Wonderful Antico restaurant just opposite

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The way they take money from your account day before you arrive and it clearly states on your site no payment will be taken until you arrive this is clearly not true the hotel just say it s only testing card and not taken money when it clearly left my account and had to wait six days to get my money back to my account I won t be going there again   Shower was lovely and comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The walls were pretty thin and I felt like the room wasn t safely closed because there was a gap between the doors and the recess At night we could hear someone being really loud in the hallway I didn t like the decoration of the lobby but that s just a preference The decorative pillows and duvets weren t clean and even had some stains on them In the area around the hotel there wasn t that much to do but there is an outside gallery where you can find food stalls and take a look at the Tower Bridge We asked for a second duvet because the ones that the give you are quite thin   There was a fridge a kettle some tea coffee and a packet of cookies in the room Room 510 has a pretty nice view of the shard and you can see the London Eye In the bathroom they give you bio shower essentials and a shower cap but you have to pay 1 50 for a razor etc The hotel isn t that hard to find but the area at night might feel a bit unsafe There are many bus stops really close to the hotel and right across the square the is a Sainsburys local You can also get the radiator in the bathroom turned on They can also print tickets for you you just email the file to the reception It also has a hairdryer but remember to bring UK adapters or you ll have to pay 6 95 at the hotel you can get one for cheaper at Boots

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: A bit of a walk from the station about 15mins from London Bridge which isn t too far but needed a taxi with our bags   Overall a very good hotel it s rare that I go up in my budget but it was a nice change and worth the additional cost The staff were excellent facilities very good and the room was spacious and nice No complaints

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: air con didn t work as room was too hot I complained in the morning and was told it would be fixed for my 2nd night it wasn t I had another hot night   room was nicely designed

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Nothing specific it was quite a small room but for a short stay perfectly acceptable   Room arrangement was fun quiet with view over the square Comfortable beds and bed linen

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Strange room arrangement with desk behind bed Noisy heating system could hear hum from it all night   Clean and serviceable No road noise on 5th floor Near some great places to eat on Bermondsey st

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Needs a proper reception desk rather than a chichi cabinet with no where to rest on You can take retro too far Also on a personal level the B 2 logo grates on my mathematical nerves as it is Bermondsey Square not squared   Just used the room which was lovely clean

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Location is a 10 15 min walk to any tube station No alcohol served in the hotel bar The check in reception is a random desk person that checked us in wasn t very clear when explaining the card pre authorisaton process   Comfy bed clean room but nothing special Nice large shower Big towels We able to leave our bags in the luggage room the day we checked out whilst exploring London Bermondsey market is on the door step Friday morning Sainsbury s local opposite

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Complex arrangements about when coffee was free and when it wasn t Plumbing issues our loo blocked and there was a pouring tap in the breakfast area all a bit undermining  Nice big room

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Very limited space for hanging clothes No dresser Necessary to live out of suitcase for 5 days Used large desk surface area for suitcases Wonderful location for our purposes with easy connections to bus lines  Clever room design focusing on the business traveler Staff consistently friendly and helpful Poor drainage of water from shower with overflow into bathroom but very nice bathroom overall

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Didnt like there was no bacon so could not have traditional English breakfast of bacon and eggs Hotel owners should not foist their own dietary restrictions on their paying guests   Liked the ambience and quirkiness

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: the quilt just say fitted the bed if I d been sharing a bed I would have had to fight for it  smoothies were lovely and scrambled eggs freshly made

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: no convenient parking no alcohol served onsite  trendy boutique hotel located on Bermonsdey square cafe cinema few steps away nice food interesting room layout

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Duvet was very bunchy some areas had no filling in at all Shower was fitted badly and could have done with a bleach to make it look brighter Not a great location for the tube although only a 15 minute walk and there was a bus stop nearby Bottles of water for the kettle would have been good   Quiet area and great staff We had a bite to eat before going out one night and food service was very good

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The fluctuating rate from one day to another it s understandable for high and low season but not day to day the days of instant coffee are long gone  The neighbourhood and its restaurants The hotel has the basics for a comfortable stay no bla bla bla

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Directions to hotel weren t great so required a phone call to find it   Room spacious and nicely decorated Wonderful shower Great choice of food for breakfast with attentive staff

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: No safe in your room no wardrobe either to hang your clothes Just some hangers at a coat rack Small breakfast buffet It is London but the room price is expensive for what you get   Quiet location nice neighbourhood 10 minutes walk from the London Bridge railway and underground station Friendly staff complimentary smartphone A good size room with comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: New management has imposed a no alcohol policy Obviously many of us think it is nice to have a glass of wine with a good meal although I can perfectly well survive without and certainly respect other peoples different preferences on this However being imposed a hotel management s biases is something that I am not expecting or happy with at all and never experienced before This feature of the hotel s policy is also not advertised on the webpage or its profile so it appear management realize it could impact bookings On the contrary the webpage advertise it is located in the heart of ever evolving Bermondsey with its thriving restaurant bar and club scene The omission of this policy on the webpage makes people like me feel there is a not full and honest transparency of the hotel s profile I have stayed many times at this hotel before but this new policy will make me reconsider returning I would suggest management consider changing it back and respectfully let their guests decide for themselves their approach to alcohol   Location is great comfy beds and staff very nice

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The bathroom smelt I complained and something was done which made the smell slightly better I think it is due to the open drain in the bathroom In the end I bought a 60p bottle of bleach from the Sainsburys next door and that sorted it   The bar restaurant in the square

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The rooms overlooking the Square are quiet The hotel is in a great location with many independently run restaurants Fifteen minute walk to Tower Bridge and the city It is a cozy establishment which has a restaurant Staff pleasant and helpful Very clean with a really good shower room Toiletries provided with towels Really good value for the money

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The hotel is located in a very nice area but terrible for accessing public transportation   The room was great the staff incredibly nice and professional

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Check in reception is part of the cafe on the ground floor there is only one terminal and one member of staff to check in hence the process is slow when 4 or 5 rooms have to be checked in as when we arrived The superior room only has a shower with a fixed head and sound insulation between rooms is poor so much so that we were kept awake with some hanky panky which was clearly going on in the next room   Staff very friendly room was clean and adequate for a one night stay Bed was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Not enough storage in room Rooms smallish but well designed Not enough coat hangers Always bring my own Reception and dining area lovely but decor in rest of hotel could do with a little revamp  Great location Beds very comfortable Breakfast good value Coffee and tea making facilities in room plus provision of iron Large desk Quality toileteries provided Hotel is quiet

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Young male employee at breakfast was surly However the older proprietor manager and the young female staff member were lovely and seemed to try to compensate for the young man s attitude   Upon check in ordered English Tea and Brownies through room service which arrived promptly and brownies were delicious

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: I didn t have breakfast in the hotel I thought it was a little expensive but the food I did have was really nice so I am sure it would have been lovely There are lots of nice cafes on Bermondsey street which I went to   Getting given a free Mobile phone with data included in the room was just fantastic I could use the maps while I was out and about over the weekend The food I had in the hotel was all lovely the room was a good size all comfortable and it was a great location Also great value for this location

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Great location in Bermondsey near London Bridge and related tourist attractions Fantastic and friendly staff who offered to mind my bags while I went exploring for the day

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Lovely comfy bed great bathroom and facilities in room Great location as wanted some where to stay close to the shard and was only 10 minute walk away

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Smelly drain smell in the bathroom although we could shut the door   Our room was very comfortable with a wonderful view of the shard Excellent location

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Need better location details for sat nav parking down the road is a bit of a hassle   Staff attitude always positive and very helpful Quality of the food was better than expected Good pub close bye

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: It was all brilliant until I burnt a hole in my top with the iron School boy error not checking the settings before ironing   The hotel is very modern and cosy the bonus of having a terrace room was lovely and the little things such as electric black out blinds and mini fridge to store wine were very helpful The breakfast was lovely and I don t think I ate again that day it was so filling

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The character of the hotel the location was brilliant and the suggestion of the car park was amazing as being in London I would have worried about that but for the 2 day we were there I literally didn t worry once about the car Everything about the hotel was lovely had such a lovely weekend away and the hotel just added to it massively

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Air con unit rattled a bit   We asked for a quiet room and they made sure we got one The young gentleman who checked us in was brilliant very helpful and addressed any requests we had made

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Lovely really quirky hotel in Bermondsey Street rooms were comfy not huge but London and brilliant area with friendly staff and really excellent value

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Those interested in booking should be aware this hotel has a no alcohol policy That was no problem for me but could be for others who might want to entertain guests at their hotel   Really helpful staff well designed room ultra clean well equipped bathroom wifi available

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: We thought the fact you have disability access rooms fab but did feel some of the furniture would make it hard for a wheelchair user to use the room effectively  Loved the late breakfast

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The way breakfast was lay out was a little disjointed and confusing but very yummy   The room was clean and comfortable I haven t slept so well in a hotel for years And the rain shower well just soooo cool

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: No gym No pool Nearest underground station is some distance away  Comfortable bed Clean bathroom Supermarket Sainsbury Local and restaurants in the vicinity Ironing board Quiet neighborhood

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: I had plenty of time to make my way there when arrivng And when checking out I decided to head to the city on foot brilliant walk over the Tower Bridge But I suppose for people in a hurry its a bit far from the Tube with baggage Or did I just get the wrong station And why wasn t it real bacon with the breakfast   Staff were all great They were helpful friendly and yet professional Loved the syle the decor the location with the park shops and pubs nearby The price for a last minute booking in London seemed like a bargain too Really enjoyed my all too brief stay there

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: We stayed in a family room as there were three adults the Bed third person was sleeping in was very soft nearly like sleeping on a water bed The room seemed to have a lot of aids for disabled guests which was fine and not sure if all rooms were similar None of us required any aids but I m sure these would be very useful to others   Location excellent Staff very nice and helpful Room was comfortable and never heard any noise during night Just let travellers know this is a dry hotel in that they don t serve alcohol but you are welcome bring your own and they provide glasses there is a nice bar in the square if you want to have a drink also

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: I was not told that 25 would be taken from my account at the start as a deposit in case I used extras They didn t explain the situation with holding money and then taking it again at the end very well I was left confused and was told by staff that everybody is confused when it comes to this If so why don t they change it and be like everyone else Also the air conditioning didn t and when I rang about it they sent someone up who hadn t a clue how to fix it

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: For 190 a pretty boring room and no breakfast included No alcohol served at the hotel either   Good location for what we needed in to central and o2 arena

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Nothing  Excellent location funky reception area rooms individually designed with creative use of space easy to park close by and not too expensive for London Staff were friendly helpful efficient

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: The bed was very uncomfortable Felt like the mattress was very old Room very noisy couldn t work out if it was the aircon or not Room also small Decor is tired and in need of some maintenance Staff were not particularly welcoming or helpful Food choices for breakfast are odd For the price I would not recommend There s a Premier Inn just around the corner and I think I ll just stay there next time   Great location Bermondsey has lots of great independent restaurants and coffee shops to explore

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Breakfast was not a standard English breakfast staff were not as welcoming to me and my partner as they were to others was charged twice for my stay and had to call my bank to sort it out  The location of the hotel and the standard of the room The members of staff who greeted us when arriving were lovely very welcoming and even called us a taxi to take us to The Shard

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: Shower water distribution was poor probably timescale  Room was very clean and well presented Location was in a nice cafe culture area 15 min walk from London Bridge tube

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
Full_Review: On booking com it didn t state that the hotel didn t serve alcohol or pork It was New Year s Eve went to the bar for a drink and were told this Was not happy when we were in the uk capital  The bed was very comfy and staff friendly

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel

Hotel_Name: Bermondsey Square Hotel A Bespoke Hotel
