Somewhat overpriced  Excellent location Comfortable spacious room junior suite Good sound isolation given that the hotel is on a very busy street Care for details like fresh flowers in the room free Nespresso coffee tea water etc Excellent breakfast

Only one minor comment for improvement There is a small working table in the room without any electricity outlets near by This is a major issue for any business traveler such as myself  Great location and great room One of the best buffet breakfasts I have experienced and I travel a lot

Breakfast was too expensive for what it was   The beds were very comfortable shower excellent and everywhere was very clean The roof terrace and pool was outstanding Reception staff were very helpful and check in was perfect with a nice welcoming drink

Breakfast bar is very good but pricey 23 EURO It would be a good price for lunch but buffet closed at 11 I wish they would stay open little later This is my personal probably it works for most other people I like to wake up later   Very friendly and helpful staff Room is very spacious and clean Bed is super comfortable Terrace bar and pool are very nice I loved decor very unusual and modern Really enjoyed the stay Great location close to everything

I had my 50 year birthday and the hotel sent up champagne and cake It was great Location great the room great and the bathrom fabulous The balcony upstairs good but the swimmingpool is perhaps not as big as one would think looking at the photos
Fabulous stay Friendly helpful staff Great accommodations Breakfast is not to be missed a buffet like no other coffee was the best in all of Europe

Nothing The photos made the room look much smaller Both bedrooms and bathrooms were quite big   Rooms are very new and clean Professional and attentive staff Very nice design of the exterior and interior Would come back again to this hotel
Excellent location The staff were helpful in helping us with printing our train tickets We highly recommend this hotel to anyone traveling to Barcelona

I chose this hotel for my first step in Barcelona also Europe in Chinese New year vacation It didn t disappoint me Everything was perfect Nice staff great service When I walked in hotel they said Happy New Year to me and gave me a free upgrade to a suite That was definitely a wonderful experience I know I will come back to Barcelona one day then I will choose this hotel again

The bar on the top flour is boring inside we didn t had chance to see the terase as it was raining outside   I loved the lounge area Nice breakfast buffet We were 3 friends staying at the jr suite great to have a big bathroom

nothing at all   We arrived 4 hours too early yet our junior suit was available it was large convenient and looked precisely like it s pictures Someone realized my wife had her birthday during our stay Room service surprised us with free nice bottle cakes and a kind note from the manager The place is stylish very unusual in a good way Public space is divided so as to makes one feel as if in someone s home Stuff were very kind and helpful Didn t eat at the hotel nor use the roof pool came in winter when temp was very cold Lot s of good eating options just nearby Would happily make this hotel my Barcelona Home

The toilet in the bathroom was a little awkwardly placed   Reception service was fantastic I requested a bottle of cava to celebrate with which they also added some lovely macaroons Location coffee machine iron bed rooftop bar heated pool all great

When making the booking it said 1 single bed and 1 double bed but was informed on arrival that family room had sofa bed not single bed Was disappointed but when we saw it the sofa bed was huge and the other bed was a queen size Good size room if you have older children with you   Staff were really helpful and friendly Couldn t fault this hotel in any way Location was brilliant

Could not have asked for a better and more comfortable location My partner and I were celebrating a special occasion so they upgraded us to a room with view for free and brought up to the room a special treat A bottle of bubbly and strawberries dipped in chocolate Best start on this visit to Barcelona

The breakfast was a bit too pricey for what was offered Additionally I wanted to get a massage but couldn t find anything inside the info booklet in the hotel honestly I was also lazy to ask the staff   The bed was great the room amenities are amazing you have a coffee machine inside the rooms The bathroom was also spacious and amazing the design of the hotel is impeccable The staff was very polite Would really recommend and already did to my friends

Honestly I have no complains that s unusual for me so you guys are doing a good Job   I like that there was complimentary coffe in the room and of course welcoming drinks are always nice Staff was super friendly and helpfull It was my girlfriends birthday during our stay and when we came back to the room on of the staff members brought as a botle of cava and a lovely chocolate cake that was a wery pleasant surprise Thanks again for that
Welcoming should be better they told us checking in is at 15 00 which we have waited more than 4 hours  Great location very convenient and awesome decoration

The odor at the lobby area too much eucalyptus but thats minor Perhaps the lobby bar could be more lively I think they are missing something there but it might be the season I can see some trendy tapas and some cocktails   The decor and service were great Outstanding English skills Beautiful bathrooms Great breakfast and the event lady and the reception desk were all very friendly

Liked the whole experience Can t think of anything I didn t like   The style of the hotel including the furniture art colours and patterns Very funky and friendly Staff were excellent always friendly and helpful

All was amazing only thing to notice is that the basic rooms may have a window only to the inside patio of the hotel   Amazing hotel for this price range Great service great room great lobby for meetings nice roof deck with a small pool
Nothing   Clean nice lovely hotel with great breakfast and in the perfect location Above all the staff is amazing Thank you all staff members David Jerano Albert and everyone else Just great people
Great hotel in many ways unfortunately are they using an air freshener in the public areas that made both me and my friend a bit sick If they would stop using that I would definately come back

Free drink at the hotel bar on the roof seemed like a plus but the waitstaff up there seemed less than helpful   No matter what you want to do you ll be in the heart of the city staying at H10 Cubik The location is close to everything from shopping restaurants cafes and museums You ll have no issues getting to all the nightlife on Las Ramblas or along Passeig de Gracia The hotel is super clean the room was spacious and well appointed and the staff were exceptional We would definitely stay here again

Nothing everything was perfect   The staff were outstanding They went the extra mile way to make our trip extra special as we were celebrating a birthday Excellent location rooms were gorgeous brilliant views from rooftop terrace

Rooms need to resize  Location was perfect They offered me room with city view online later at check Inn they give me a room facing back of hotel some poor dirty building Terrace was so big without a view and room was so so small even one cannot stand with a luggage inside the room May be the fare is only for a great location
The location was perfect and the staff very helpful We ended up on the 7th floor in a room with a balcony overlooking the City a very nice surprise Clean room and an excellent rooftop bar

An odd overwhelmingly rich and pungent perfume on entering the hotel foyer that if deliberate is a significant error in taste The lifts are slow and the rooftop bar was a little dull and given the rest of the offerings in the city probably best avoided Also being asked to join the membership of the hotel to improve the room wasn t appreciated at the hour of check in after midnight Being told that I had a small room and so should become a member to increase the comfort meant I had to challenge this in finding the confirmation of the room booked it was a superior double   A decent hotel for a short stay The rooms had good flooring plenty of space and full length windows The location is pretty good in terms of proximity to the main sites but this also meant that it s on a somewhat generic street You have to walk somewhere else to experience the city I didn t have the breakfast there were plenty of interesting options around the city Staying here is absolutely fine for a short stay but we shouldn t pretend it s anything beyond a solid experience and for that I think it s slightly over priced

Pricey right on the edge of discomfort   Bed was high side comfortable bathroom large and showers new design Bring your electrical converter Found plug inside the safe for recharging devices Great location not in touristy area Quite secure from street thieves common in Barcelona Good local restaurants in neighborhood and great bar

Unsightly graffiti could be seen out of our window on neighbouring houses   There was a great selection for breakfast The roof top terrace was a lovely place to chill out with a glass of wine I loved the pots of sweets around the hotel

The hotel is centrally located with easy access to old town port and public transportation Five minute walk to airport bus The staff were exceptionaly helpful and friendly The room is bright modern and tastefully decorated with alll the necessities My wofe and I were very happy and plan to return in the near future
Location close to everything The rooftop was amazing The beds were super comfortable And the whole vibe was very cool We loved it and would definitely stay there again

Rooftop bar service a little slow  Rooms very modern and junior suite spacious Rooftop is brilliant and comfortable Great way to wind down after a day out exploring Helpful staff welcome drink was nice after a long flight

Like a lot of Barcelona hotels out room was overlooking the internal covered courtyard this makes the room quiet and away from street noise but its also makes it very dark and not a place to relax during the day   Fantastic central location and wonderful roof top bar and terrace with affordable drinks and friendly service

I emailed them before our stay to say our trip was to celebrate my Mum s 60th birthday When we checked in and went to our room we d been upgraded to a suite and they d left us a bottle of Cava chilling in an ice bucket and cakes such a lovely touch

Nothing  Location perfect for everywhere Hotel team very attentive and they provide little extra special touches Beds mega comfy and ambience of roof top bar perfect for chilling with a warm blanket they provide and a lovely glass of Rioja

I paid a little extra for a better view but was given a room on the second floor with a view of flats with washing hanging out Also the bed was a little hard  The breakfast was excellent Service and front reception very helpful We loved the sweets that were scattered around

Long waits for the elevator but luckily i found the stairs which were much quicker   Friendly staff nice clean room great rooftop terrace with small pool Very cheap compared with other hotels at least at the time of booking
Nada  Warmy welcome with free drinks Designed environment Spacious large room very confortable bed so cosy and nice like at home Nice located Perfect Place to enjoy Barcelona

I certainly didn t like how the stuff was very not helpful They forgot about my late checkout didn t order a proper sized taxi and was very unpleasant  Location is great that s for sure I liked the interior very much and I just fall in love with the bathroom

The room was a little on the small side but the outside terrace was a bonus   The roof top bar is a real plus and the tapas and wine were all excellent Really appreciated the complementary drinks in reception on arrival and the roof top bar The staff were all very helpful and attentive Our room was very quiet

We got dropped off by our taxi at the entrance and had to carry our bags into the reception and then also up to our rooms no one to help us with that which was disappointing We were on our honeymoon and let the hotel know before arriving but again no recognition at all from front desk on this which was a shame given the two previous hotels had given us various complimentary gifts gestures to celebrate the occasion The roof top bar is nice but nothing special and the pool was roped off with caution tape both nights we went up All relatively small things but when you pay a certain amount and it is meant to be 4 star you expect a certain standard   the ground floor lobby reception area is very nice and unique with great artwork and plenty of comfortable lounge areas to sit down and relax and a nice bar too We stayed in one of the junior suites and it was nice without being amazing good size bed nice shower and well layed out
Nothing Everything was amazing   Great rooftop bar and drinks comfortable beds and lovely bathrooms It is perfect for walking around and close to shopping areas gothic quarter and good restaurants

Didn t have any luggage racks in the room   The bed was very comfortable The staff was super Provided with welcome drink while checking in Then provided us with complimentary wine or beer to have on their rooftop terrace We were celebrating our 30th wedding anniversary and my birthday and they sent champagne and chocolate covered strawberries to our room one night and another bottle of champagne and chocolate mousse cake the next for my birthday They were very helpful with helping to book sites to see and restaurant reservations Very clean Good sized room with nice big bed and large bathroom with large shower Very nice hotel

We did like everything   Everything was great Room was nice with great view Staff were really wellcoming and helpfull They even noticed our wedding annivercary by bringing us cava and strawberries in to our room Rooftop terrace is great Location of the hotel is best in Barcelona
Fabulous hotel in every way Love the concept of the chain Right from having the room ready early to free drinks on the roof top patio Amazing shower

The breakfast staff were not all on the ball and one of the bar staff on the top floor was also less helpful sadly This was different to all the others we came across  Reception staff were great and very helpful The decor was spectacular

We were totally satisfied   Wonderful staff very clean modern designed room comfortable bed excellent shower generous coffee and bath toiletries great rooftop lounge area tasty candies available in the extensive and well appointed common areas Easy walking to all the things we wanted to do

Beautifully stylish wonderful roof top deck with pool and bar So close to all of the action in Barcelona The staff were friendly and helpful and the room was an excellent size and comfortable and just what we needed and expected at thos level of hotel The breakfast buffet was to die foor and one of the best we had with so much variety on our Europa holiday We loved our stay here and we ll be back

The bar shuts early even to residents and the Atik bar has to be vacated even earlier   Great location lovely hotel clean funky and a 5 star service A very warm welcome at reception on arrival complete with prosecco and some excellent advice on what to see where to go and how to get there Free room upgrade Excellent staff throughout very obliging informative and friendly It is expensive but it is worth it

Nothing it was perfect   Fantastic decor very original Welcome drink on arrival plus voucher for free drinks in bar Plunge pool on terrace on 8th floor was great to cool down at the end of the day with a cool glass of sangria

The room layout was very awkward and the cleaning staff seemed to lack attention to detail Upon arrival there were used coffee pods and creamers next to the nespresso machine We had a drink on the rooftop and our waiter was not friendly   The bed was incredibly comfortable and spacious Although being on a very busy street you don t hear street noise at night the windows must be triple pane The location is very convenient in order to get to many many places The hotel staff were very kind even presented us with a bottle of cava and dessert to celebrate our honeymoon

Male greeter was sub par offered other people refreshments on a hot day but ignored my girlfriend and I which we found quite odd   Bed was awesome Roof deck area was great Hotel was very clean Lady at the front desk was very helpful free wifi is great location was perfect close to the city center and all of the good shopping and food areas

The price was very high Much higher than I think the pool rooms and location warranted I have stayed in other places in Barcelona and they have much better value Breakfast was outrageously priced we left and ate at a local place for what one of us would of paid The pool area could of had a few more shade choices and view could of been better No way to share a larger room for family   The hotel had a unique look and the public spaces were very nice The room was a nice size Maybe that is why is was SOOOOOO expensive

The acoustic insulation of the room was not so good   Excellent location great service wonderful breakfast and beautifully designed All the facilities were very clean and comfortable and the roof terrace was very nice

Visited with family for wedding anniversary Great location wonderful use of art colour and architecture warm and friendly staff extremely comfy beds great breakfast all in all a wonderful venue and we shall revisit
Nothing serious to highlight trivia really housekeeping could have left more tea bags each day  Breakfast was excellent with a great selection hot cold

Amazing staff beautiful hotel design and a great rooftop We stayed with 40 of our friends and family for our wedding weekend in Barcelona and I couldn t be happier with the hotel choice The staff completely took care of us the location was great food was good the rooftop was amazing and the general design of the hotel is incredible Highly recommend staying here

The room was nice and large but they should provide stands for the suitcases The bathroom was spacious also so please add a little more storage or shelf space These are small gripes I ll definitely stay again   Beautifully decorated Staff was very friendly and helpful Great location Even though we were on the second floor on a busy street the room was very quiet No street noise

Wonderful breakfast hot and cold included much variation and all freshly prepared dishes great Wifi skybar had wonderful view good matrass good pillow choice of 3 different types soft or firm great location too
I was happy with everything the hotel had to offer  Extremely clean and up to date facilities decor was great Friendly staff and the rooms were organized efficiently

Really clean and modern hotel within walking distance of most of the sights Staff were really friendly we had a glass of champagne upon arrival Comfy beds and delicious breakfast Would definitely stay again
Complementary drink on arrival sweets in jars scattered around the bar seating area etc lovely bathroom towels for sunbeds 10 10 hotel

Not much wrong with this place Downstairs bar staff a bit abrupt to the point of rudeness Both bars closed at midnight which seemed a bit early for Barcelona   After a very tricky drive through Barcelona stressed and a little warm we were extremely efficiently welcomed and checked into the hotel by staff on reception who topped it all off with complementary cava We were shown to our very comfortable room on the 7th floor which had great views over the city from its balcony

The terrace was not as big as it seems on the pictures and the pool was neither Still it offered a nice view over BCN There were refreshments at the reception but it wasn t offered to us Also I would have liked to have a little tour of the hotel in order to find out where to find what   The Breakfast was amazing and the hotel is very pretty
Fresh milk for tea coffee   Great staff Public area s look great fitted and in 70 s retro furniture Rooms clean modern and bright Location great too
We loved staying at this hotel for the attention to detail from the welcoming drink to the accommodating reception staff and the facilities design and comfort Thank you
Nothing it was perfect   Oasis in a large city Lovely air con rooms comfy beds fab breakfast and a super rooftop terrace with small plunge pool Central position near Placa de catalunya
I would ve preferred if the bed and sofa were different closed rooms Also a 24 hours room service would be great   Everything location room size wifi staff it was a great hotel
Great staff very well trained attentive to all your needs Very clean Complimentary Espresso in Am Great location awesome terrace on the roof Strongly recommend

Air conditioning blew straight to the bed creating cold wind even with low fan speed So I had to sleep without conditioner My room 701 was next to some service room Personnel coming back and forth with different instruments created noise that was hard to sleep with Internet It was half working Like everywhere in Spain   Really great space design both in public places and room
NOT A SINGLE THING   Great customer service Camillo was simply the best Clean modern perfect location in the Gothic district Free espresso in the room and lounge We loved our stay and will return

The only complaint is the quality of the brewed coffee at breakfast The machine brewed coffee was better that s a pretty insignificant complaint   Loved the location size of the room friendly staff and the roof top terrace All the facilities were first class

Our room was 7th floor and there was noise from the roof bar of 8th floor   Great location We can walk to Passeig de Gracia La Rambla and Barceloneta Beach The staff are kind and nice It is like a boutique hotel with remarkable architecture and interesting elements of decoration

Everything was wonderful not a thing to dislike Pricey but I don t mind paying for quality   The room lovely modern large and spotlessly clean The bathroom was fabulous and well appointed with an enormous shower and good products and huge bath towels The bed was comfortable and the pillows plentiful The hotel Loved the modern style and ambiance of the hotel We were struck by the wide variety of chairs all over the hotel and refer to the hotel as the place of many chairs The welcome juice water champagne snacks were awesome after an exhausting plane ride The view from the roof deck was spectacular and we went up there every single day of our stay really enjoyed using the pool The toy robots in the bar were fun the library off the lobby was a lovely place to relax The staff Fantastic especially Victor and David who were there to greet us when we arrived I really appreciate how they bird dogged the Delta Airlines baggage people until they delivered my delayed suitcase Food The downstairs breakfast room was beautifully decorated the array of breakfast items options was wonderful and plentiful constantly refreshed by the staff We really enjoyed the tapas at the roof top restaurant Location Great Only a short walk to the Placa Catalunya The staff helped us get tickets to local attractions which was also greatly appreciated

Our room interior door handle fell off twice in 2 days We booked a city view room but could only see roofs of other buildings not attractive We were told this was the best they could offer as only the city view rooms have external windows The interior view rooms are dark and face the interior corridor Website photos deceiving re views and space on rooftop This is boutique small   Excellent central location and public rooms bars well furnished modern as expected of a new hotel Comfortable bed quiet room and spacious shower Rooftop bar area nice retreat altho tiny plunge pool only
Stinky room smelt like drainage However quickly resolved by the lovely staff and we were upgraded   Upgraded as we arrived Attended to our needs efficiently and appropriately

Nil  The hotel s decor is exquisite well thought out and maximises on the interior natural light that is available We were fortunate to be upgraded to a suite which was most welcome and very luxurious The staff were very pleasant and most helpful We were very happy with our choice of hotel
very dirty Bottles of drinking water are opened one who was drinking have not changed shower dirty marks another s feet towels are not fresh very dirty room not fresh
Ask and pay for city view high floor and light I get 2nd floor and a courtyard without intimacy Bath room not really clean poor amenities  Location

Room stank of sewage when we complained they sent a cleaner who sprayed some air freshener which masked the smell for twenty minutes We asked to see the hotel manager the next day but he wasn t available we were told he would get in touch with us as soon as he was available nobody got in touch and we had to suffer the sewage smell for two nights This took the shine off what would have been a great break in a lovely hotel   great roof terrace and bar lovely modern hotel with friendly staff good location

The staff were incredibly welcoming and helpful and even gave us a free upgrade and lovely bottle of champagne with strawberries to celebrate our anniversary Rooms were soundproofed so couldn t hear a peep from the outside despite being in the centre of Barcelona Was also extremely handy to have parking under the hotel Would highly recommend

H10 Cubik was the best hotel where I have visited in Spain Nice appearance sensual interior in the lobby and room was clean and comfortable And the location is also good to walk and take the metro I really want to visit here again
A little more storage space in room needed No dressing table with mirror for ladies to do their hair   Cleanliness Courtesy and helpfulness of staff Excellent breakfast

The beds were very large and comfortable rooftop views are great Staff very polite and helpful Breakfast is of a very good standard with very good produce supplied Excellent location for visiting all the sites very close to a metro stop and also a short walk to catalunya square

When I arrived at 14 40h my room was not ready yet but I had an appointment at 16h in another neighborhood After a long journey I really needed to have a shower The staff didn t give me a solution and I had to wait until the room was finally ready at 13 35h They compensated it with a nice bottle of Cava and delicious chocolate   the hotel looks beautiful My congrats to the architect and interior designer The terrace is excellent for having dinner a glass of wine enjoying the views

Excellent location in centre of town with easy access to all transport 5 minute walk to La Rambla Barcelona Cathedral 1st stop for hop on off tourist bus 4 routes and Airport bus services Hotel has generous sized rooms junior suite bath room fixtures and fittings are high quality Open air bar on 8th floor a great place to relax and enjoy the view

room a bit too small  overall experience was excellent my room had a balcony with access to backyard roof terrace with nice view very professional and helpful staff especially marilen very attentative and care taking

Window looking into the internal part of hotel Some marks on paintwork Hopefully these will be addressed as the hotel is not yet a year old   The hotel was in an excellent location less than 5 minutes walk from the Airbus stop in Catalunya Square Close to Metro Gothic area with the cathedral was very close Room very comfortable with large bed However I would have liked the option to select a twin room as I was travelling with my daughter Bathroom clean with large shower cubical with two showers I liked the touch of providing bath robes and slippers Coffee machine in room was very useful Bottled water was provided every day Roof top terrace was a wonderful place to relax

The hotel is lovely with an amazing terrace and friendly staff who made everything from check in to check out pleasurable I proposed to my partner while staying and H10 was the perfect choice for our stay

The staff were very welcoming and extremely helpful without being too pushy or over familiar Very professional The hotel is new and modern The room was clean and comfy with a Nespresso machine Nice touch The bathroom was quite large with a very modern feel We enjoyed some tapas and a complimentary drink in the Atik bar where you can get a lovely view of Barcelona

The staff was very friendly and helpful It was our first time to Barcelona and we would definitely stay again at the H10 Cubik I just wish we had more time to relax in the hotel and enjoy all it had to offer We were only there the night before a cruise departure
The hotel is well located to tourist attractions bus to the airport and the main boulevarde la Rambla The roof top terrace and the pool were most enjoyable in the evening
The most comfortable bed I have ever slept in The breakfast was excellent All staff extremely courteous and friendly Can not recommend this hotel highly enough

Amazing hotel Fantastic central location 5 mins from catalunya square and near shops and la rambles Drink on arrival and free welcome drink on beautiful roof top bar overlooking city Small pool not big enough to swim but good to cool down excellent breakfast mix of buffet and cooked options Would definitely recommend

Nothing   All the staff were excellent in all areas from checking in bar and restaurant The rooms were clean quiet comfy beds good lighting lovely bathroom and nice towels Breakfast was delicious with lots of choice Great roof bar too with friendly service Loved the hotel would definitely stay again and recommend to anyone

Not much that we didn t like The rooms are small but who cares really The walls are thin so you can hear people walking on the wood floors This didn t bother us though Breakfast seemed very expensive but they had a pretty good selection I would just walk down the street and grab a quick bite for 5 euro instead of 23 euro though Roof deck bar was just ok but glad they had it It s worth grabbing a drink one night The hotel staff is very friendly and helpful but you will get better deals in the bus shows etc if you just order online   Great location Near everything but not too noisy or crowded Tour bus is just around the corner which is great Las Ramblas short walk Beach is 20 minutes or so but nice easy walk All the good restaurants are 15 minute walk Very happy with the location Very clean hotel and very modern Nice bar and sitting area

Extremely disappointed by 2 points Firstly I asked many week in advance for a bottle of sparkling wine to be delivered to my room on arrival as this was my Wedding anniversary This was confirmed NOTHING ARRIVED The day before I asked whether we could check in early This was confirmed albeit subject to availability However when we arrived there was basically no chance as the hotel was fully booked which must have been known the day before We were even told to come back at 330 even though the official check in time was 3 The main point here is that I asked 2 very specific questions and both were confirmed in particular the bottle of wine to the room I could have asked but the moment had passed and given the cost of your hotel I really should not have to Unfortunately its the small things that make the biggest difference and Im afraid this has left me very unlikely to book with you again   Location breakfast roof top
Breakfast overpriced best to get your own in Barcelona at a fraction of the price  Good location nice terrace on the 8th floor Great nespresso machine in the room if you love good coffee Good shower

I had asked prior to visit for a room higher up due to reading other reviews on road noise this wasn t dealt with and we ended up on 2nd floor with lots of road noise through the night as hotel on main road Given it was a special occasion for visit and hotel informed of this I feel this wasn t taken into consideration Person checking us in at time was trying to do 2 other jobs at same time which wasn t I was impressed with  The breakfast was very good rooms clean and modern
Anticipate checking in later than expected on Sundays   We had the junior suite and could not have asked for a better room The bed was comfortable and clean The staff was nice and accommodating

Quite a strong perfume smell permeated the lobby and hallway areas each day we were there It would have been pleasant in smaller doses but was a bit much You could sometimes hear the staff and people next door quite audibly walking on the wooden floors next door or outside the door vacuuming the hall Not a biggie but noticeable   The Junior Suite was very spacious the bathrooms a super generous size and the waterfall shower absolutely glorious The staff were extremely friendly and helpful Its location is absolutely second to none We graciously received Cava and chocolate covered strawberries at the start of our stay to help celebrate our honeymoon The rooftop bar overlooking the city is stunning at night time Be sure to ask for a blanket you ll end up out there for hours

Rooms could be a bit bigger but for the great price location and cost they are wonderfully appointed   Beautiful and well presented hotel in a great location just up the road from the cathedral and medieval city staff were delightful and so friendly
I didn t feel valued We arrived and had heard about the Cava on arrival but I had to ask for a glass They wasn t rude we just felt like we were a room number
V little In fact only the pizza from the bar menu which was not quality or freshly made   Excellent buffet breakfast Lovely roof terrace which was a sun trap and has small pool V comfortable rooms

The staff in the breakfast area was not very friendly they did not seem to like their job very much The breakfast was too expensive The price for the hotel stay was slighty high   The staff in the reception was really friendly and had great tips for restaurants The roof top terrace is absolutely Amazing Nice big rooms great location Cool atmosphere and decor i the hotel Really good breakfast but toooo expensive
Rooms were in the small side however they were well laid out   Our room 107 had access to a private terrace area with 6 daybeds perfect for some downtime

Simply Overpriced Somehow the bed n pillows were not that comfortable I couldnt sleep well all four nights   The staff was cooperative The location was pretty good The terrace had very good views of the city

Beautiful and modern hotel in downtown Barcelona near the main sights Rooftop bar and pool are a great place to relax with a beer after a day on the go looking over the rooftops of the city The rates are expensive but we tho t worth the money

I have no negative comments  The staff made the real difference they are very professionally friendly and obviously work well together and respect each other Then of course the style and d cor of the hotel was also great different and fun

Only had shower no bath would have been nice after a day walking around the city but minor downside   Location perfect to use public transport to get around Breakfast excellent Roof terrace a very nice place for a drink
Very good location staff ia friendly and helpful We stayed in junior suite comfortable big room satisfying all needs Very nice terrace everything is clean and modern Breakfast is very nice as well

Breakfast staff were a bit slow sometimes or forgot to offer coffee   Very central location just a short walk from the airport bus stop It s in a beautiful part of the city and its well worth walking everywhere to really absorb the ambience The internal room was very dark and quiet so we slept really well Great room cleaners Lovely breakfast choice and quality

A door between the two rooms in our suite did not close Small cleanliness issues but not big deal   The staff at reception was truly exceptional in accommodating all our needs and to help us navigating the city Outstanding

The staff was sometimes helpful and other times rude The room service we ordered was burned and when I let the staff know about it their response was rude and unhelpful The internet didn t work properly either

The only little niggle was one of the bar staff in the bar downstairs wasn t very attentive and he looked pretty miserable when you asked him for something Everyone else was lovely   Lovely hotel great location great style and decor

Some noise from the floor above but nothing serious   Perfect location 2 min from Placa Catalunya beautiful interior design a complimentary drink while checking in very courteous staff willing to help Best breakfast ever
The architecture is unique and classy Great view at the top of the hotel for sunsets and views The staff was uniquely helpful Nice to have a wall between the living area and bedroom
There wasn t anything I didn t like   The hotel was fantastic For only being open a few months there wasn t the usual hiccups you would find Everything ran smoothly Service was exceptional

Maybe would have been nice to have a real window in the room not just from a light shaft though this seems to be the norm in Barcelona   Great location Super nice and professional staff Brand new building handsomely designed Very comfortable bed Good wifi

Nothing   Friendly and helpful staff glass of cava during check in welcome cocktail at the roof top bar Excellent breakfast with hot food cooked to order beautiful room with a bed that was very very comfortable

More english speaking channels on TV  This is a great city hotel Great location friendly and attentive staff great wifi and great condition If they maintain these standards and not increase their room prices I would never stay anywhere else in Barcelona
They did give us an accessible room but when hubby took a shower we gained a swimming pool in our sitting area   Lovely staff very good English exceptionally stylish yet whimsical

The location is wonderful Staff are friendly and helpful I do not think our room is well designed Usually when you enter a room it is better to see a hall way not directly the room Our room I feel when other people open the door they will see our bed No good choice for the amount spent   the location is owe some

The price of breakfast so we just had our breakfast in the organic cafee   wonderful renewed design and interior decorations are absolutely breathtaking The location is perfect The room was very comfortable
Cleaning was a little random No towels in room on arrival Hotel not been opened long and think it was a communication issue   Most amazing massive bed and great shower
I was amazed with the check in team was very helpful and welcoming Great decor Room was very comfortable and with a cool view Delicious breakfast with a large selection
Not enough cartons of milk in the room to use with the nespresso machine and a room service charge of over 3 if you ask for more   Great location brand new hotel rooms were so quiet

Our room was fronting the street and the facade of the building is lit up with LED lighting It would be even better if stronger blackout blinds could be installed to make the room darker at night However this wasn t a huge issue for us   Basically a brand new hotel that was very well presented The quality of the finishes of both the room and the general hotel facilities were very impressive A very modern hotel The staff were amazing and were always friendly and helpful The hotel is located in a great spot Whilst not located immediately close to anything amazing a lot of great things are within a 10 minute walk or a couple of stops on the train

The only downside to our stay was that our bedroom had the distinct odour of Barcelona s drain system Our two children s bedrooms were fine though   The hotel is in a great central location Inside the interior design is funky and modern without being overpowering The staff were very helpful and the glass of champagne and complimentary roof terrace cocktails on check in was a very nice touch

Very very loud with thin walls Could literally hear what TV show was on in next room Could hear conversations Bad But worst was the AC You have to put your room key in a slot by the door to turn on the AC When you leave obviously you have to take the key out and so the AC is always off when you aren t in the room So when it s 98 degrees outside as it was when we were there it is boiling hot when you walk back in the room from being out sightseeing and takes a couple of HOURS to cool off and even after several hours we figured out how to stick a piece of paper in the slot so the air would run while we went out it was still barely cool at all Would never use this hotel again for that reason along with the noise Bed was adequate but sheets felt like sandpaper Had to climb a 3 foot tub wall to get into the shower Cheap toiletries Makeup mirror loose and no washcloths Not a great experience to say the least   Clean and good location and nice front desk but that s all that was good

Although breakfast is served in a dining room there is no restaurant for any other meals Then again the choice outside the hotel is quite good   Central location Walking distance of several Gaudi properties We felt safe on the streets at night although like any major city a need to be aware of opportunistic pickpockets in the major tourist areas Excellent and very friendly and helpful staff Nothing was too much trouble Rooms were clean and spacious with good aircon all over the hotel The Wifi generally worked well not more than 7mbps in our room but signal did drop occasionally Then again we booked for a holiday break and not streaming videos Hotel Bar was open until 10pm but the choice of bars many opening into the early hours were available within walking distance There was a good breakfast until 11am with a reasonable choice of hot and cold food although not always piping hot Cheery breakfast staff as well We had stayed in what would be considered a more upmarket hotel in Barcelona a few days earlier The Sunotel in my view though was a more pleasant experience all round My wife and I will definitely return

The only negative point was that I was on the first floor with a small balcony and people above discarded their cigarettes onto it Not the hotel s fault it is the irresponsible smoker but the cleaner did not clean outside at all whilst I was there   I didn t book the breakfast However I had it two times in four days Some people on here have complained about the price but for cereal and or a cooked breakfast with toast coffees and juice followed by yogurt and a bowl of mixed fresh fruit It really is good value Do your public transport homework Buses and the Metro are very easy Get a T10 transport pass and you can catch the 59 bus around the corner to the beach for just 1 Euro per person and its about 4 miles away The Metro will take you to any of the tourist places and the beach If you are not so confident or have a bigger budget stand outside the hotel and flag a taxi down within 30 seconds or so Visit the Son Hao Taiwanese restaurant at Carrer de Muntaner for the most amazing Asian like Chinese food available in my view in the whole of Barcelona There are also fantastic Italian and Greek food within a 5 minute walk Its a nice slow 20 minute walk to the centre of Barcelona Plaza Catalonia but you can vary the walking route and window shop along the way Plenty of Spanish tapas bars etc nearby and some English Irish pubs Also I found at least three places selling craft beers including a BrewDog pub just streets away from the Sunotel Club Central which is legendary Enjoy

Pool opened at 10am the day we tried to go there That s late AC was not working the first two days but was on the third It may have been to early in the season beginning of April but it was already warm in Barcelona   First impression was how courteous all the front desk clerks were The ones working there the first day we arrived and all the other ones we met during our stay Extremely helpful with directions to Barcelona s top attractions They even use different color markers to match the subway line colors to get you to the destinations you want The room is well maintained but there is nothing extra special about it nor anything bad Very generic but comfortable and clean The bed was a little bit soft to my taste and there was no choice of pillows for you to chose from a harder one to a softer one Nevertheless it was still a comfortable and clean bed Bathroom was also clean The free amenities are very basic Just shampoo and bath gel The only problem in the bathroom is that the tub is higher than the bathroom floor and the tub border is pretty thick When stepping out of the shower you are actually stepping down If you don t realize it you can hurt yourself if you are short My fiancee has a huge purple bruise on her leg because of this We stayed in a room without breakfast so I can t review it At 16 euros per person it is simply too expensive Go across the street to a caf called Honey Operated by two friendly twin sisters offering simple but well made food that is fresh and made when you order All in all this was a good hotel where the good points outweigh the bad ones I would consider it more of a three star than a four star but in the end I would recommend it and would stay there again P S I don t know if its possible but I would like to see a pamphlet with instructions on how to change languages on the TV Everything in Spain is dubbed into spanish but I could see there were options to change languages As much as I tried I couldn t figure out how to do it If the hotel cable service offers the ability to change languages I would like to see them make it clear how to do it

I know the NH Hotel chain very well but this tone was a total surprise for me Check in was fast and ok but later on I had two rooms in order to accomodate my kids Their room had issues heater didn t work out and shower was not working properly either Both issues were communicated to the front desk but only the shower was repaired I asked twice for the heater to be serviced but no feedback and no repair either In front of this hotel there are many parking lots but be careful They look to be property from hotel but they are not I got a fine 39 Euros from the city I am sure lot of people do the same mistake I saw other 8 cars with same yellow paper on the windshield Why don t they ask if you know about that in the check in   Breakfast was good 19 euros per person but warm foods are not kept warm There are not warming lights or fire under them Once they are on the display they cool fast Check out was fast
